# 隆基绿能

LONGi Green Energy is the world's largest monocrystalline silicon [[photovoltaic-cell]] manufacturer. Drove global monocrystalline adoption, reducing PV costs. Aligns with solar growth trends in [[nrel-solar-futures]].
